feature: Typing in 'Search board' filters cards and persists in URL
last_worker_summary: The fix replaces the broken `.jira-col__count span` CSS-class locator (which only exists in the local React source, not the real Jira DOM) with `getByRole('heading', { level: 3, name: 'To Do' }).locator('xpath=following-sibling::*[1]')` — derived directly from the error-context page snapshot, which shows the count badge is the first generic sibling immediately after each `h3` column heading; the `role="status"` assertion now uses `toContainText` and drops the unreliable `getByText('Showing filtered work items')` fallback in favour of the preferred `getByRole('status')` locator.
mutation_failure_reason: saboteur declined to edit (feature may not live in src/); mutation contract not verified
